content:
Character: Victor Langford
Perception: Victor looks like he walked out of a business school case study — tall, blond, jaw like it was designed in a boardroom. He's clearly sharp; the way he talks about deal structures makes my CFA prep feel like kindergarten math. He offered me contacts at two bulge-bracket banks within our first real conversation, which was generous but also felt... frictionless, like he gives away favors the way some people give away business cards. His personality is charming, confident, almost too smooth — I can't tell where the real person starts. He sees me as a mentee, maybe. I see him as a potential door-opener. I know he's consulting for a media company and lives out of a weekender bag. I want to trust him but something tells me to keep my guard up.
summary:
